settings.text: A quote in under two minutes.

Call, email, or fill the form below. We'll confirm your flat-rate quote within the hour during business hours, and match you to a cleaner whose schedule and specialty fit. First clean typically happens within a week of booking.

settings.title: Five quick details.
settings.description: Have these handy and the quote takes about 90 seconds.

settings.title: From inquiry to first clean in days.
We quote within the hour
settings.description: During business hours (Mon – Sat, 7am – 7pm). Flat-rate, no sales call, no obligation. You get exactly one number and what's included in it.

settings.title: We match you to a cleaner
settings.description: Based on neighborhood, cadence, specialty, and schedule. You meet them before the first clean — by video call or a quick in-person walkthrough.

settings.title: First clean within days
settings.description: Most standard cleans are scheduled within a week of quote. Deep cleans and move-in/out can go sooner if the calendar has room; tell us if you're tight on time.

settings.title: Neighborhoods we serve
settings.text: Capitol Hill, Wash Park, Platt Park, Congress Park, Five Points, Highlands, City Park, Park Hill, Cherry Creek, Baker, Berkeley, Sloan's Lake, LoDo, RiNo.

settings.title: Outside our area?
settings.text:
We keep the radius tight on purpose — a 45-minute drive to a clean is 45 minutes the cleaner isn't working.

If you're in the broader metro (Lakewood, Englewood, Aurora), email us and we'll point you to a vetted local service we trust.

settings.title: More detail on the Services page
settings.text: The full FAQ covers cleaning-type differences, insurance, the guarantee, pet policies, and every question people actually ask before their first clean.

settings.question: How do you handle keys?
settings.answer: Three options: smart-lock code, lockbox we install and manage, or key-drop at your building's doorperson / concierge desk. Most clients pick smart-lock or lockbox and never think about it again.

settings.question: What's the pricing on add-ons?
settings.answer: Every add-on is a flat rate, listed on the Services page. Inside oven is $40, inside fridge is $35, interior windows start at $45. We quote them up front before the clean — you never get surprised on the invoice.

settings.question: Can I change frequency later?
settings.answer: Yes, any time. Biweekly to weekly, weekly to monthly, monthly to one-off and back. No contracts, no change fees. Email or text and we adjust from the next clean forward.

settings.question: Last-minute clean?
settings.answer: Same-week cleans are usually possible for standard and deep cleans if we have openings. Same-day is rare but not impossible; call the main line and we'll check the schedule live.

settings.question: Do you clean during holidays?
settings.answer: We close for six federal holidays per year. Clients with recurring bookings on those days get rescheduled to the next business day — no lost clean, no fee.
